summary: Manage Athletes feature (Event Prep page) tested successfully. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified via Playwright - Manage Athletes button visible, dialog opens with full roster and photos, add/remove athletes toggles work, prep page updates correctly, empty state shows 'No athletes assigned yet' with Add Athletes CTA.
critical_code_review_comments: EventPrep.js correctly implements AddAthletesDialog component with roster fetched from GET /mission-control
POST /api/events/{id}/athletes correctly adds athletes and persists to MongoDB
DELETE /api/events/{id}/athletes/{athlete_id} correctly removes athletes and persists to MongoDB
Duplicate athlete additions are handled gracefully (no duplicates created)
Toggle buttons correctly show Add/Remove states based on current event athlete_ids
Empty state displays 'No athletes assigned yet' with Add Athletes CTA button
Dialog shows athlete photos, names, positions, and grad years
All data-testid attributes present: add-athletes-button, add-athletes-dialog, add-athletes-empty-cta, roster-athlete-{id}, toggle-athlete-{id}, prep-athlete-{id}
seed_data_creation: Used existing test events (event_1, event_da650533, event_e5ef2bdd) and created multiple TEST_ prefixed events for pytest
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manage Athletes feature fully tested. POST /api/events/{id}/athletes adds athletes, DELETE /api/events/{id}/athletes/{athlete_id} removes athletes. Both endpoints persist to MongoDB. Event Prep page at /events/{id}/prep has 'Manage Athletes' button that opens AddAthletesDialog showing full roster from GET /mission-control (myRoster field). Athletes have photos, names, positions, grad years. Toggle buttons show Add/Remove based on event.athlete_ids. Empty state shows 'No athletes assigned yet' with Add Athletes CTA. data-testid selectors: add-athletes-button, add-athletes-dialog, add-athletes-empty-cta, roster-athlete-{id}, toggle-athlete-{id}, prep-athlete-{id}.

Toggle athlete changes button state (Add -> Remove) - PASS
Prep page athletes section updates after toggle - PASS (3 -> 4 athletes)
Empty state event prep shows 'No athletes assigned yet' - PASS
Empty state shows Add Athletes CTA button - PASS
